text.title: Implementation Plan Examples: Simple (3 Tasks) and Medium (7 Tasks)
text.summary: Simple 3-task email verification example and medium 7-task payment system example showing wave analysis tables, dependency notation, and per-task detail format as structural references.

rule.statement: Choose example scale before generating a plan: simple (1-4 tasks), medium (5-8 tasks), complex (9-15 tasks). Use the matching example as a structural reference only — do not copy task names, file paths, or effort estimates.
rule.rationale: Agents generate exactly as many waves and tasks as the example shows, regardless of the actual feature complexity. Explicit scale selection prevents this anchoring.

rule.statement: Replace all hour-based effort estimates from examples with token estimates. The project rule prohibits time estimates.
rule.rationale: Agents copy "3h", "5h" verbatim from examples into real plans, violating the no-time-estimates policy.

example.note: Wave analysis table — table format, not ASCII diagram
example.code:
## Wave Analysis
| Wave | Tasks | Parallel | Dependencies | Token Est | |------|---------------|----------|--------------|-----------| | 1 | TASK-001 | No | None | ~40k | | 2 | TASK-002, TASK-003 | Yes | Wave 1 | ~60k |
## Dependency Graph
TASK-001 (email service) blocks TASK-002 (verification handler) TASK-001 (email service) blocks TASK-003 (registration integration) TASK-002 and TASK-003 are parallel in Wave 2

example.note: Per-task detail format — shows required fields
example.code:
### TASK-001: Create email verification service
**Wave:** 1 **Complexity:** normal **Context:** ~40k tokens
**Description:** Create service to generate verification tokens, send emails, and validate tokens. JWT tokens with 24h expiry.
**Traces to:** AD-001 (Email verification), FR-003 (User activation)
**Depends on:** None **Blocks:** TASK-002, TASK-003
**Acceptance Criteria:** - [ ] generateToken() creates JWT with user ID and 24h expiry - [ ] sendVerificationEmail() sends email via configured provider - [ ] validateToken() verifies JWT and returns user ID - [ ] Tokens expire after 24 hours
**Files:** | Action | File | Purpose | |--------|-----------------------------------------|-----------------------------| | CREATE | src/services/emailVerification.ts | Email verification logic | | MODIFY | src/services/email.ts | Add verification template |

example.note: Wave analysis table for medium-scale feature
example.code:
## Wave Analysis
| Wave | Tasks | Parallel | Dependencies | Token Est | |------|---------------------|----------|--------------|-----------| | 1 | TASK-001, TASK-002 | Yes | None | ~75k | | 2 | TASK-003, TASK-004 | Yes | Wave 1 | ~95k | | 3 | TASK-005, TASK-006, TASK-007 | Yes | Wave 2 | ~130k |
## Critical Path
TASK-001 → TASK-003 → TASK-005 → done

## Phase 1: Infrastructure
### TASK-001: Payment database schema (~30k tokens) - CREATE payments table - CREATE payment_methods table - Add indexes and constraints - Traces to: AD-001, FR-001
### TASK-002: Payment provider integration service (~45k tokens) - Create provider client wrapper - Implement payment intent creation - Add webhook handling - Traces to: AD-002, FR-002
## Phase 2: Core Logic
### TASK-003: Payment processing service (~55k tokens) - Create payment service - Implement charge and refund logic - Error handling and retries - Depends on: TASK-001, TASK-002

antipattern.description: Copying wave analysis speedup factors (1.8x, 3.5x) from examples verbatim.
antipattern.reason: Speedup calculations depend on the actual dependency structure. The example numbers are illustrative and will be wrong for different dependency graphs.

antipattern.description: Generating exactly 3 waves because the simple example has 3 waves.
antipattern.reason: Complex features may need 5+ waves. Wave count must derive from the actual dependency graph, not the example.

antipattern.description: Parallelizing test tasks with implementation tasks.
antipattern.reason: Test tasks depend on the implementation they test. Tests cannot run in the same wave as the implementation they cover.
